subject: Fermi GBM trigger 190619235/582615488 likely not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 190619235/582615488
at 05:38:03.14 UT on 19 June 2019 was tentatively classified as a GRB.
However this trigger is likely due to a statistical fluctuation."


For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit
the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
